selections.name: Easy Effort
selections.reason: Possesses strong tactical early speed and consistent figures (92 speed, 94 class) that fit perfectly in this spot.

selections.name: Dreamy Druso
selections.reason: Consistent runner-up in last two starts. Boasts a strong class rating of 107 and handles fast tracks well.

selections.name: Well Hey There
selections.reason: Solid speed figures (86 speed, 91 class) make her a major player from the outside post.

selections.name: Superstitious
selections.reason: First-time starter for Robert Gorham. Showing solid workouts and bred for early speed.

danger_horse.name: Tu Tu
danger_horse.reason: Could surprise at a price if the top choices engage in a suicidal early duel.

selections.name: Ryan's Wish
selections.reason: Draws the rail with high speed figures (100 speed, 95 class). Loves this track and is highly consistent.

selections.name: Taylor's Moonshine
selections.reason: Tactical speed merchant coming off a solid MSW win. John Haran and Amir Mendoza are a lethal combination.

selections.name: Chisel
selections.reason: Strong late speed (101 speed, 89 class). Drops in class slightly and will be flying late.

selections.name: Special Creed
selections.reason: Back to a dirt sprint where he excels. Strong class rating of 94 makes him dangerous.

danger_horse.name: Trust The Word
danger_horse.reason: Boasts a speed figure of 100 and could capitalize if the pace collapses early.

selections.name: Funtastic Vow
selections.reason: Standout speed figures (109 speed, 97 class). Clearly the class of the field and the one to beat.

selections.name: Gimmeethreesteps
selections.reason: Excellent form with a close second last time out. Boasts a 107 speed rating.

selections.name: Sound Doctrine
selections.reason: Inside post advantage with strong early speed. Should secure a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Decatur Street
selections.reason: Consistent runner who always fits well in this class. Solid late kick.

danger_horse.name: Me And Chili
danger_horse.reason: Boasts a 101 speed rating and could surprise if the track plays to closers.

selections.name: Lucky Lollipop
selections.reason: Huge class drop from a Churchill Downs MSW. Boasts a class rating of 104.

selections.name: Rebelka
selections.reason: Solid debut at Laurel. Fits well here with a class rating of 102.

selections.name: Echo Paradise
selections.reason: Well-bred debutante for top connections. Showing solid morning workouts.

selections.name: Spring Loaded
selections.reason: First-time starter showing decent workouts. Bred for early speed.

danger_horse.name: Capability
danger_horse.reason: Could surprise if the first-time starters fail to fire.

selections.name: Great Sword
selections.reason: Excellent tactical speed and draws a great inside post. Turf pedigree is solid.

selections.name: Comes A Time
selections.reason: Kentucky shipper dropping significantly in class. Draws the rail.

selections.name: Fear And Loathing
selections.reason: High speed figures on the grass (111 speed). Major threat if he gets a clean trip.

selections.name: Born Flashy
selections.reason: Strong late kick (113 speed) and highly consistent turf form.

danger_horse.name: Revs Medal
danger_horse.reason: Tactical speed merchant who could steal it if left uncontested on the lead.

selections.name: Channelurambition
selections.reason: Only runner in the field with a proven speed figure (89). Ran a solid second in debut.

selections.name: Cash Per Trip
selections.reason: Well-bred debutante showing solid workouts. Coty Rosin is capable with firsters.

selections.name: Buccheros Song
selections.reason: Inside draw for a top trainer. Bred for early speed.

selections.name: Captain Shagaf
selections.reason: Genaro Garcia debutante. Must be respected on connections alone.

danger_horse.name: My Pal Patron
danger_horse.reason: Well-bred debutante who could surprise if the top choices fail to fire.

selections.name: Sweet Heat
selections.reason: Class of the field. Very strong turf router with a class rating of 101.

selections.name: Amazingness
selections.reason: Highly consistent runner who fits perfectly in this class.

selections.name: Fifth Wheel
selections.reason: Strong late closer who will be flying late if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Funs Lil Sis
selections.reason: Tactical speed merchant who should secure a great trip.

danger_horse.name: Tap Bonnet
danger_horse.reason: Could surprise if she gets a soft lead and a slow pace.

selections.name: Red Raze
selections.reason: Standout class (105 class rating). Top turf sprinter with excellent connections.

selections.name: Emoji
selections.reason: Very consistent on grass (110 speed rating). Major threat.

selections.name: Serena's Surprise
selections.reason: Inside post advantage. Drops significantly in class from Churchill.

selections.name: Demure
selections.reason: Well-bred debutante for top connections. Showing solid workouts.

danger_horse.name: Paradiseperfection
danger_horse.reason: Could surprise if the top choices engage in a speed duel.

selections.name: Jess Knew
selections.reason: Top class and highly consistent QH sprinter. The one to beat.

selections.name: Dare To Fly
selections.reason: Massive speed figure (110). Major threat if he gets a clean break.

selections.name: Apollitical Ocean
selections.reason: Consistent performer who always fits well in this class.

selections.name: Jf Requestingaflyby
selections.reason: Solid late kick (102 speed rating). Will be flying late.

danger_horse.name: Rr Coronados Cash
danger_horse.reason: Could surprise if the top choices fail to break cleanly.
